mechanism: Intercalates within DNA and inhibits topoisomerase II, causing DNA damage in cancer cells.
Inhibits proteasomal degradation of pro-apoptotic factors, inducing apoptosis in cancer cells.
Inhibits BCR-ABL and SRC family kinases, disrupting signaling pathways in leukemia.
Inhibits HIV protease; has potential effects on cancer through induction of apoptosis.
Enhances immune response and induces apoptosis in myeloma and leukemia cells.
Inhibits JAK1 and JAK2, modulating cytokine signaling and promoting apoptosis in malignant cells.
Forms DNA cross-links, inhibiting DNA replication and transcription in cancer cells.
Exhibits cytotoxic effects in tumor cells, possibly through mitochondrial dysfunction and ROS generation.
